content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Multiset". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1354/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the multiset. The second line contains n space-separated integers, representing the elements of the multiset.
content.outputFormat: The output should contain the size of the largest subset of the multiset such that any two elements in the subset have a difference of at least d.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the multiset and then iterate over it, adding elements to the subset if the difference between the current element and the last element in the subset is at least d.

code.Python3:
import sys
n, d = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
arr = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
arr.sort()
count = 1
last = arr[0]
for i in range(1, n):
    if arr[i] - last >= d:
        count += 1
        last = arr[i]
sys.stdout.write(str(count) + '\n')
